description.en: SNARC was an early stochastic neural analog reinforcement calculator built by Marvin Minsky and Dean Edmonds. It used simulated synapses and reward-driven behavior to model a rat learning a maze.
description.zh: SNARC 是马文·明斯基和迪恩·埃德蒙兹建造的早期随机神经模拟强化计算机。它用模拟突触和奖励驱动行为来建模老鼠学习迷宫的过程。

subcaption.en: Original local explainer of SNARC-style reward learning.
subcaption.zh: 关于 SNARC 式奖励学习的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。
